% This is generated by ESQL's CommandDocsTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

```esql
FROM employees
| WHERE emp_no NOT IN (FROM employees | WHERE salary < 10000 | KEEP emp_no)
| SORT emp_no
| KEEP emp_no
| LIMIT 3
```

| emp_no:integer |
| --- |
| 10001 |
| 10002 |
| 10003 |
